Title: Relates to reimbursement for grants for the hiring of teachers, arts and music teacher grants and nonpublic school safety equipment grants
Summary: Provides that reimbursement payable for grants and aid for nonpublic school children, the hiring of teachers and arts and music teachers shall be paid within twelve months of the education department's receipt of a complete application for such grant or aid.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to reimbursement for grants and aid for nonpublic school children and the hiring of teachers
